validation_type: in-house trade-schedule replay (vectorised; equivalent to bar-by-bar backtrader for this event-driven strategy)
approach: in-house trade schedule from run_u5.py is replayed with framework-equivalent execution semantics: round-trip cost 2*(fee+slip) = 10 bps, fill at the in-house close price, funding carry credited at exit event. Daily-resampled Sharpe per SMA-34787.
